verifiedpermissions.identitysource.cogni: A structure that contains configuration information used when creating or updating an identity source that represents a connection to an Amazon Cognito user pool used as an identity provider for Verified Permissions.

verifiedpermissions.identitysource.cogni.Description: The unique application client IDs that are associated with the specified Amazon Cognito user pool.  Example: `"ClientIds": ["&ExampleCogClientId;"]`
The [Amazon Resource Name (ARN)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/aws-arns-and-namespaces.html) of the Amazon Cognito user pool that contains the identities to be authorized.
